raw_consumer_statement:
An XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX property was booked in my name without my doing. I had booked a different property and when I looked the next day, 2 properties had actually been booked. I called XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and they said it was to late to cancel even though I told them I had not in fact booked the second propery - for the exact same dates the first was booked for. 
I attempted many times to get them to cancel this booking but they refused as it was beyond their 24 hour cancellation policy. 
I contacted my credt card company and they issued a dispute. On XX/XX/year> I recieved an email form XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX stating " Your reservation has been cancelled and your refund of {$3100.00} is on its way '' I called my credit card company that same day to report this and the respresentative suggested I withdraw the dispute. I said I was afrad to do this as XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX may withdraw the credit and the agent said " This will never happen '' This conversation is on a recorded line and the credit card company has acknowldged this. 
Shortly after, the charge went back on my card and I called to reopen the dipute. On XX/XX/year> I recieved a letter from my credit card company stating it could not be reopened and I would have to pay the charge. 
I have called and talked to supervisor after supervior who told me that even though the conversation was recorded and the representaive gave me the incorrect infrmation they will do nothing for me.
